title: Whispering Currents
caption: Silky water cascading over black river stones in a hidden creek.
story: Using a long exposure and a neutral density filter, the turbulent waters of the cascade melted into liquid silk, reflecting the emerald green of the surrounding canopy.
curatorNote: Long exposure shot (2 seconds). Frame with dark border on web presentation.
altText: A long exposure photo of a smooth flowing forest stream over smooth mossy rocks.
